Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 91 

PRVDR_ENRLMT_START_DT 

LABEL: Provider Enrollment (Medicaid and/or CHIP) Start Date 

DESCRIPTION: The start date of the provider’s enrollment in the Medicaid and/or CHIP program with the state. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_START_DT 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_START_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): APR enrollment 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Date
